name: Hip Flexor and Quadriceps Stretch
aliases: Stretching - Hip Flexor and Quad Stretch
intermediate hip flexor and quad stretch
shortDescription: A stretch that lengthens the hip flexors and quadriceps by using a kneeling or lunge position.
instructions: Start in a half-kneeling (lunge) position with one knee on the floor and the other foot planted in front. Gently shift hips forward while keeping torso upright, feeling the stretch in the front of the rear leg and thigh. Hold, then switch sides.
steps: Begin in a half-kneeling position, one knee down, one foot forward.
Keep torso upright with hands on hips or front knee.
Push hips forward slightly to increase the stretch.
Feel the stretch in the hip flexor and thigh of the back leg.
Hold for desired time, then switch legs.
commonMistakes: Letting front knee go past toes
breathing: Breathe deeply and steadily throughout the stretch.
